MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc, is present. Represented by Leo Guzman.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Paul Blake is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Player representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Neil Bardack, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JUL-16-2012 remains on calendar.
